name: Hubstaff Time Tracking API
what_it_does: Time tracking and employee monitoring platform with REST API — tracking work hours with screenshots, activity levels, GPS location, and app usage for remote teams, with payroll integration and project/task management for distributed workforce management.
use_cases: Querying employee time logs and activity data via API for payroll processing
Accessing GPS location and work session data for field workforce management
Syncing Hubstaff project and task data with project management tools via API
Automating payroll calculations from tracked hours and pay rates via reporting API
Integrating Hubstaff activity data with HR systems for compliance and productivity reporting
not_for: Self-reported time tracking without monitoring (privacy-conscious teams — use Clockify or Toggl)
Creative/knowledge workers who object to screenshot monitoring
Simple project time logging without workforce management features
best_when: A distributed team or staffing company needs time tracking with verification (screenshots, activity), GPS for field workers, and integrated payroll processing.
avoid_when: Your team resists monitoring-style tracking, you need simple time logging, or are in regions with employee monitoring legal restrictions.

auth.notes: OAuth2 Authorization Code for third-party integrations. Personal access tokens for direct API use. Scoped access per resource (time activities, screenshots, projects). Organization-level and user-level token distinction. Refresh token for long-lived access.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter from $4.99/user/month; Grow from $7.50/user/month; Team from $10/user/month
pricing.notes: No free tier after trial. Credit card required. US-based company. Strong remote work and outsourcing use case. GPS and screenshot monitoring differentiate from competitors. Payroll integration built-in. 95,000+ businesses.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth2 app; 200 requests/10 minutes documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API covering time activities, screenshots, projects, members, and organizations. OAuth2 with scopes. Webhook support for activity events. Good developer documentation. Rate limits documented. Pagination for large datasets.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Time activity reads idempotent. Project/task management idempotent for same values. Payroll operations create new records. OAuth tokens create new sessions.
known_agent_gotchas: Credit card required for trial — barrier for automated testing
OAuth2 scopes must be configured per integration — not all data accessible by default
Rate limit of 200 req/10 minutes — conservative for bulk data export
Screenshot and activity data is sensitive — handle PII appropriately in agent pipelines

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant. OAuth2 with scopes. Screenshot and location data encrypted. US data residency. Employee monitoring data requires legal compliance in some jurisdictions — operator responsibility.
